step_rationale: Anti-oxidized-LDL autoantibodies form pathogenic immune complexes; oxidative lipid-modification anchor.
mechanism: IgG autoantibodies targeting oxidized LDL form circulating immune complexes that promote plaque inflammation and destabilization.

references.title: Stroke and myocardial infarction induce neutrophil extracellular trap release disrupting lymphoid organ structure and immunoglobulin secretion.
Atherogenesis and the humoral immune response to modified lipoproteins.
Oxidized LDL antibodies in treatment and risk assessment of atherosclerosis and associated cardiovascular disease.
